title: 「V1 + Bare Infinitive」句型
titleZh: 「V1 + Bare Infinitive」表達容許、促使、幫助與感官經驗
titleEn: Using let, make, have, help and perception verbs with a bare infinitive
formula: Subject + V1 + object + bare infinitive + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + let / make / have / help + object + bare infinitive + other information

formulas.labelZh: 看見、聽見或感覺完整動作
formulas.formula: Subject + see / hear / watch / feel + object + bare infinitive + other information

example: This song lets me see the culture of Japan more deeply.
exampleZh: 這首歌讓我更深入地了解日本文化。

examples.en: This song lets me see the culture of Japan more deeply.
examples.zh: 這首歌讓我更深入地了解日本文化。

meaning.zh: Let、make、have、help 和部分感官動詞後，可接受詞及不帶 to 的原形動詞，以指出誰進行第二個動作。

rules.en: Do not put to before the bare infinitive.
rules.zh: 原形動詞前面不可以加 to。
examples: The teacher made us rewrite the paragraph.

rules.en: Only the first main verb changes for tense.
rules.zh: 只有前面的主要動詞需要按時態變化；第二個動詞保持原形。
examples: The teacher let us use a dictionary.

rules.en: Use the correct object pronoun before the bare infinitive.
rules.zh: 受詞要使用正確的受格形式。
examples: The coach made them practise again.

rules.en: Help can take to, but this lesson uses the bare form.
rules.zh: Help 後面可以有 to，但本練習統一使用 help＋受詞＋V1。
examples: The map helped us find the station.

rules.en: A bare infinitive after a perception verb normally presents a complete action.
rules.zh: 感官動詞後使用 V1，通常表示看見或聽見完整動作。
examples: I saw the bird land on the fence.

rules.zh: Make 的被動句會重新使用 to；本課主要練習主動句。
examples: Tom was made to stay behind.

benefits.en: It clearly identifies who performs the second action.
benefits.zh: 受詞放在原形動詞前，能清楚說明誰進行第二個動作。
它可把 allow someone to 或 cause someone to 改成較直接的句子。

benefits.en: It distinguishes permission, causation, arrangement and help.
benefits.zh: 不同 V1 能準確區分准許、促使、安排和幫助。

benefits.en: It makes stories and descriptions more vivid.
benefits.zh: 感官動詞結構能直接描寫完整事件，使畫面更鮮明。
It made me、They let us、I saw someone 等是實用說話框架。

en: Rewrite each sentence using let, make, have, help, see, hear, watch or feel + object + bare infinitive.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 let、make、have、help、see、hear、watch 或 feel＋受詞＋原形動詞改寫以下句子。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: My mother allowed me to choose the dessert.
questions.promptZh: 媽媽准許我選擇甜品。
questions.answer: My mother let me choose the dessert.
questions.answerZh: 媽媽讓我選擇甜品。
questions.highlight: My mother let me choose the dessert.

questions.prompt: The funny video caused the children to laugh.
questions.promptZh: 這段有趣的影片令孩子們大笑。
